title: Henckelia shuii
intro: Henckelia shuii, also known as Sambuci flos, is a plant species belonging to the family Gesneriaceae, commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to aid in reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Henckelia shuii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Henckelia shuii is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to promote relaxation, alleviate anxiety, and support overall well-being.
taxonomy: Henckelia shuii is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to China and is a relatively rare species.
